First Essay Title

Mar 3, 2026

The concept of exponential growth is often misunderstood.1

This miscalculation has consequences in finance, technology, and population dynamics.2

Structural Consequences

When reinforcement systems compound, they reshape incentives over time.3

Start with a strong opening paragraph. Keep paragraphs short for web reading.

Optional section heading

Continue here.

  1. Arthur, W. B. (1994). Increasing returns and path dependence in the economy. University of Michigan Press. ↩

  2. Kahneman, D. (2011). Thinking, fast and slow. Farrar, Straus and Giroux. ↩

  3. Meadows, D. (2008). Thinking in systems: A primer. Chelsea Green Publishing. ↩
